meta.title: misein

source.publication: Section 4: Roots, Prefixes, Suffixes and Foreign Words (owner-supplied reference)
source.usage_note: Personal study only. Root, words and meanings transcribed faithfully from the source PDF; a small number of well-attested real words on the same root are included where the source list was too short to form a complete family (4 to 8 members). Parts, glosses, context sentences, mentor note, attempt and construct options are the teaching layer, authored for the Language Garden (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §10).

meta.reviewer_notes: Batch 2: transcribed from the owner's roots (Greek and Latin) reference; 2 taught, 2 reach.

root.label: misein
root.mentor_note: misein is a small, blunt root, and every word it builds names a specific target of hatred.

attempt.direction_prompt: Loves the company of others, or despises humanity?

context_sentences: He described himself, half joking, as a committed misanthropist who preferred his dog to most people.
The old caretaker’s reputation as a misanthropist softened the moment anyone actually spoke to him.
Reviewers criticised the script for giving its misogynist villain the film’s funniest lines.
Colleagues quietly avoided him once it became clear he was a misogynist who never promoted a woman.
A committed misogamist, he had turned down three proposals before his friends stopped asking why.
The character reads at first as a misogamist, though the play slowly reveals a much older heartbreak behind it.

construct_options.text: Someone who hates or strongly opposes the institution of marriage
Someone who has been married many times over
Someone who dislikes or distrusts humankind in general

context_sentences: The committee’s misoneism killed every proposal that involved changing so much as the letterhead.
Pure misoneism, not any real objection, seemed to be behind the town’s decade long refusal to build the bridge.

construct_options.text: A dislike or hatred of anything new or unfamiliar
An eager enthusiasm for anything new or unfamiliar
A dislike or hatred of humankind in general
